who: medical office administrators in small clinics processing 5–15 patient intakes/month
offer: For medical office administrators in small clinics processing 5–15 patient intakes/month, inefficient manual processing causes delays in patient care. We streamline onboarding instead of manual data entry into electronic health records.
problem: Inefficient manual processing of patient intake forms.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical office administrators
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to medical office administrators with demo video
Participate in community forums for sharing tools
try_it: Let users try data validation checks and interface for adjustments
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
